name: On the Effectiveness of Pretraining for Graph Combinatorial Optimization

description: arXiv:2607.19072v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper introduces a self-supervised pretraining framework for graph combinatorial optimization specifically designed to address the nature of routing problems like the Traveling Salesman Problem. By utilizing graph contrastive learning with geometric augmentations (specifically, rotations and axial reflections) the model is forced to learn inv...
author: David Aguado, Daniel Fuertes, Carlos R. del-Blanco, Fernando Jaureguizar
